😂😭 Criminals are getting way too creative...

In a bizarre theft reported from Bhilwara, Rajasthan, a man allegedly wore a PM Narendra Modi mask while breaking into a mobile phone shop in the middle of the night.

According to reports, the accused entered the shop through the rooftop before making off with around 40 mobile phones worth several lakhs of rupees.

The entire incident was reportedly captured on CCTV cameras, giving investigators crucial footage as they work to identify and trace the suspect.

While the unusual disguise has grabbed attention across social media, police are treating the matter as a serious theft and have launched an investigation.

One thing is certain...

No mask can hide someone from the law forever.

🎭📱🚔

Follow CA Ammy Sharma
